channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Les « Skills » débarquent sur Google Chrome, qu’est-ce que ça va changer ?
item.description: Chaque skill est une requête spécifique, permettant d'effectuer des tâches variées comme l'analyse de recettes ou la comparaison de produits.

item.title: Looking for a new PC? Now might be great time to upgrade, as Gartner figures claim shipments are rising — while demand is falling
item.description: PC shipments rose 4%, but companies are probably just stockpiling ahead of even more projected price hikes.

item.title: A Crew of Worms on the ISS Aims to Help Scientists Unlock the Secrets of Space Travel
item.description: Move over, Artemis crew. Space worms are taking over.

item.title: ‘A penny-pinching brand’: Sony is removing key features from its Bravia smart TVs, and users are seriously unhappy
item.description: Sony is removing features from some of its TVs for antenna and set-top box users.

item.title: Kindle owners are struck another blow as Send to Kindle is set to stop working on old devices
item.description: Not only will old Kindles soon lose access to Amazon's ebook store, it will also become harder to send files to them.

item.title: The new engineering playbook: how AI design copilots are reshaping product development
item.description: Learn how AI design copilots are redefining engineering speed, creativity, and system-level innovation.

item.title: Piratage du ministère de l’Éducation nationale : voici les données des élèves exposées
item.description: La cyberattaque subie par le ministère de l’Éducation nationale se dévoile un peu plus. Voici les nouvelles informations disponibles à ce stade.

item.title: Ce TV de 75 pouces qui mêle cinéma (QLED et Dolby Atmos) et gaming (HDMI 2.1, ALLM) s’offre une remise de 200 €
item.description: Le Hisense 75U79Q est un TV qui propose un taux de rafraîchissement pouvant atteindre les 240 Hz. De quoi ravir les gamers les plus assidus. Le téléviseur perd 20 % chez Darty.

item.title: AI could mean the end of the Wayback Machine, as news websites are increasingly blocking it to prevent content scraping
item.description: This isn't the first time the Wayback Machine has faced what could be deemed an existential threat.

item.title: Test de du Geekom A5 Pro : performant, durable, pas trop cher et garanti trois ans, LE mini-PC du moment ?
item.description: Changement de braquet chez Geekom en ce début d’année 2026 : la communication autour du dernier mini-PC de la marque met l’accent sur la durabilité du produit, sa capacité à nous accompagner de longues années. Pour ce faire, l’A5 Pro dispose de composants éprouvés et d’une garantie de trois ans, qui est maintenant la norme chez Geekom.

item.title: The legendary RPG series that inspired The Witcher is finally coming to Xbox and PlayStation
item.description: The original Gothic trilogy is finally set to release on modern Xbox and PlayStation consoles.

item.title: Best Smart Smoke Detector (and Why You Still Need a Dumb One)
item.description: Every smart smoke alarm I’ve tested has one potentially fatal flaw, trading fewer nuisance alarms for a risky sensor strategy.

item.title: Disney begins laying off 1,000 employees. Here’s who will be affected
item.description: The layoffs follow a move in January to consolidate Disney’s marketing division. The Walt Disney Co. on Tuesday began layoffs expected to lead to 1,000 job cuts across the company.Josh D’Amaro, who in February succeeded Bob Iger as chief executive, announced broader layoffs following a move in January to consolidate Disney’s marketing division. The cuts are expected to fall across the Burbank, California-based company’s traditional television businesses, including ESPN, as well as its movie studio. Employees in product and technology, and in certain corporate functions will also be affected.“...

item.title: « Des attaques menées à distance avec des drones » : le scénario catastrophe des panneaux solaires qui alerte les chercheurs
item.description: Un nouveau point de fragilité de la technologie photovoltaïque a été découvert. Une récente étude rappelle que les installations solaires ne sont pas uniquement exposées aux cyberattaques, mais aussi à certaines perturbations physiques.

item.title: Reid Hoffman weighs in on the ‘tokenmaxxing’ debate
item.description: Reid Hoffman says tracking AI token use can gauge adoption, but cautions it should be paired with context and not treated as a direct productivity metric.

item.title: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream took roughly nine years to develop and focuses on user-generated content for 'infinite ways to enjoy the game', developer reveals
item.description: The team behind Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream has spoken about the title's development ahead of its launch.

item.title: Farewell Surface Hub — Microsoft kills off its super-sized touchscreen displays, but you might still be able to get one if you act fast
item.description: This could finally be the end for Microsoft's ambitious oversized touchscreen PCs.

item.title: Adobe’s new Firefly AI assistant can use Creative Cloud apps to complete tasks
item.description: Adobe says the assistant can work across apps like Firefly, Photoshop, Premiere, Lightroom, Express, Illustrator and its other apps to do tasks for you.

item.title: Lego’s Big New ‘Star Wars’ Set Comes Just in Time for ‘The Mandalorian and Grogu’ to Replace It
item.description: The latest UCS 'Star Wars' set brings Mando's latest ride to the line... just weeks before 'The Mandalorian and Grogu' is set to phase it out.

item.title: The Case for Tracking Everything
item.description: If every step taken, hour slept, and heartbeat can be measured, recorded, and analyzed, are we taking control of our health or losing the plot entirely?

item.title: More phone cameras should come with telephoto lenses
item.description: Upgrading your phone with a camera grip attachment is one thing. But doll-sized telephoto lenses that you mount on top of the rear camera? C'mon. I wrote the Vivo X300 off as a gimmick, a funny concept designed to generate attention rather than actual sales. But then I spent a weekend carrying the phone and […]

item.title: Adobe embraces conversational AI editing, marking a ‘fundamental shift’ in creative work
item.description: Adobe is fully embracing AI tools that enable creators to edit their work using descriptive prompts, instead of manually using specific Creative Cloud apps. The software giant's new Firefly AI Assistant allows users to describe what they want to change by typing their own words into a conversational interface. Adobe says this marks a "fundamental […]...

item.title: Amazon’s new Fire TV Stick HD is its ‘slimmest ever’
item.description: Amazon has taken the wraps off a new Fire TV Stick HD that it says is its slimmest yet. At $34.99, the device offers a design that Amazon says is 30 percent thinner than the previous generation, along with the ability to power it directly through your TV's USB port. The new design eliminates the […]

item.title: This energy startup’s bet on 100-year-old grid tech is paying off
item.description: Ayr Energy is using a shortage of power conversion equipment to break open a decades-old market.

item.title: Gitar, a startup that uses agents to secure code, emerges from stealth with $9 million
item.description: The company uses AI to review code that, more often than not these days, has also been generated by AI.

item.title: This startup is betting tokenmaxxing will create the next compute giant
item.description: Parasail raised $32 million in a Series A, signaling a fractured future of models and compute.

item.title: Amazon unveils a slimmer Fire TV Stick HD, opens Ember Artline TVs for preorder
item.description: On Wednesday, Amazon announced the launch of its new Fire TV Stick HD and Ember Artline televisions, both now available for preorder. Following the initial release of the first-generation Fire TV Stick HD two years ago, Amazon has created a new model that is its thinnest streaming device to date, the company says. Launched in […]

item.title: Chipmakers AMD, Arm, and Qualcomm are all investing in this buzzy self-driving tech startup
item.description: Wayve's $1.2 billion Series D round, which was announced in February, keeps growing.

item.title: 'Better than AirPods': these rival earbuds boast better stamina, more reliable Bluetooth — and cost a third of the price
item.description: The new SoundPeats Air6 HS take the tip-less build of the AirPods 4 and make some improvements.

item.title: Own a Fire TV device? You're getting a free update soon, with refreshed layout and new streaming channels — and Amazon's also launching a slimmer Fire TV Stick
item.description: Amazon is refreshing its Fire TV interface for 2026 with new organisation and new streaming channels. Plus, it's bringing out a new, slimmer Fire TV HD Stick.

item.title: Amazon just changed the name of its Fire TV line-up to make things less confusing — and its new Samsung The Frame rival is coming soon
item.description: Amazon's Fire TVs are being re-named to Ember TVs, and we saw the new Samsung Frame rival Amazon Ember Artline in action

item.title: What is the release date for Monarch: Legacy of Monsters season 2 episode 8 on Apple TV?
item.description: Three episodes remain of Monarch: Legacy of Monsters season 2 — here's when you can watch the first of that trio.

item.title: Adobe’s new Firefly AI Assistant wants to run Photoshop, Premiere, Illustrator and more from one prompt
item.description: Adobe today launched its most ambitious AI offensive to date, unveiling the Firefly AI Assistant — a new agentic creative tool that can orchestrate complex, multi-step workflows across the company's entire Creative Cloud suite from a single conversational interface — alongside a raft of new video, image, and collaboration features designed to position the company at the center of the rapidly evolving AI-powered content creation landscape.The announcements, which also include a new Color Mode for Premiere Pro, the addition of Kling 3.0 video models to Firefly's growing roster of third-party AI ...

item.title: Grâce à cette nouveauté, Adobe Premiere Pro vient combler son principal retard face à la concurrence
item.description: Adobe a annoncé plusieurs nouveautés pour ses outils vidéo, parmi lesquels Premiere Pro. Celui-ci pourra désormais profiter d'un nouveau menu dédié spécialement à la colorimétrie.

item.title: ‘A hardware failure in our production truck’ — Amazon Prime Video’s Heat vs Hornets live stream has major outage in overtime
item.description: Amazon's first play-in game stream frustrates fans with technical difficulties.

item.title: Comment supprimer son compte Facebook définitivement ?
item.description: Voici comment supprimer votre compte Facebook depuis un smartphone ou un ordinateur. Nous détaillons également la marche à suivre pour désactiver votre compte Facebook.

item.title: 'We have no interest in patient data in the UK': Palantir UK head defends record as criticisms rise
item.description: Palantir's UK boss says the company has "no interest" in actual data, likening the company to Microsoft.

item.title: By the way, you can get a new MacBook Air M5 for just $349 by bundling together these deals at Best Buy
item.description: Here's how to get your hands on a very, very cheap new MacBook Air M5 model at Best Buy.

item.title: Traza raises $2.1 million led by Base10 to automate procurement workflows with AI
item.description: For decades, procurement has been the back office that enterprise software forgot. Billions of dollars flow through vendor negotiations, purchase orders, and supplier communications every year at the largest manufacturers and construction companies in the country — and the vast majority of that work still runs on email threads, spreadsheets, and phone calls.Traza, a newly launched startup headquartered in New York, believes the moment has arrived to change that. The company announced today the close of a $2.1 million pre-seed round led by Base10 Partners, with participation from Kfund, a16z sc...

item.title: Fini le bruit de tracteur : Ligier lance l’anti-Citroën Ami électrique ultime, avec un prix ultime également
item.description: Le constructeur français Ligier présente sa nouvelle gamme de voitures sans permis électriques. Sur ce marché aussi, le thermique disparaît progressivement, à tel point qu’on se demande pourquoi elles n’ont pas été électriques plus tôt ? Voici la nouvelle concurrente de la Citroën Ami.

item.title: RIP pour le Surface Hub ? Microsoft débrancherait sa tablette géante collaborative
item.description: Microsoft stoppe la production de sa troisième génération de Surface Hub, visiblement sans intention de lancer une nouvelle itération de ce tableau tactile, voué aux présentations les plus chiadées.

item.title: Samsung Wallet : pourquoi vous risquez de perdre une « fonction clé » de votre Galaxy (au sens propre)
item.description: Si vous utilisez Google Wallet comme une clé pour ouvrir votre voiture ou votre maison, ne ratez surtout pas cette mise à jour.

item.title: HBO Max comes to India via exclusive JioHotstar deal
item.description: HBO Max will be available to JioHotstar subscribers as an add-on starting at ₹49 (about $0.50) per month, and would feature content from HBO, Max Originals, Warner Bros. Pictures, Warner Bros. Television, and DC Studios.

item.title: Quantum computing stocks are back on the rise. Here’s why IONQ, QBTS, RGTI, and QUBT are up
item.description: Some quantum computer companies announced news this week that has investors excited about the stocks again. Here’s what to know. Yesterday was World Quantum Day, a day dedicated to raising awareness of the physics that powers the quantum computers of tomorrow.

item.title: Nothing makes it easy to share files between any Android phone and a Mac
item.description: I test Android phones for a living, but I write about them using a company-supplied MacBook Air. Both platforms are great in their own right, but they're not so great at talking to one another. On a handful of Google Pixel and Samsung Galaxy phones you can now AirDrop files directly to Apple machines; Nothing's […]

item.title: Faut-il ajouter une batterie à ses panneaux solaires de balcon ? L’étude qui tranche
item.description: Le solaire de balcon séduit de plus en plus de ménages européens, notamment lorsqu’il est associé à une batterie. Mais derrière les promesses d’économies et d’autonomie, la question de la rentabilité reste loin d’être tranchée.

item.title: Les meilleurs VTC électriques en 2026 : quel vélo tout chemin choisir ?
item.description: Vous cherchez un vélo électrique polyvalent, qui vous permette de vous déplacer en ville tout comme vous balader en forêt ? Un VTC électrique (Vélo Tout Chemin) vous permettra de tout faire sans effort. Voici notre sélection des meilleurs modèles de type VTC électrique.

item.title: 'A total disappointment': Some Galaxy Watch owners are seeing major battery drains after the latest software update
item.description: There's a problem with certain Samsung Galaxy Watch models and battery life, and Google Play Services could be to blame.

item.title: 'There is a romance to platonic love': Big Mood season 2 star Nicola Coughlan on why female friendship in new Channel 4 series needs Bridgerton fan treatment
item.description: Big Mood season 2 arrives back on the small screen this week — and Nicola Coughlan agrees on the need for Bridgerton-style energy with this chaotic female friendship.

item.title: Transporter 200 kg et 2 enfants sur un vélo de moins de 2 mètres : la grosse promesse du vélo électrique Sugg Cargo & Kids
item.description: Nouveau modèle de la marque belge Sugg, le Sugg Cargo & Kids accepte jusqu’à 200 kg et 2 enfants dans un format compact, le tout avec des composants de qualité et une bonne dose de praticité.

item.title: Macy’s is closing more stores in 2026: See an updated list of locations that will shutter soon
item.description: The retail chain has marked a number of stores as ‘closing soon’ after previously announcing a wave of closures as part of its ‘bold new chapter.’ Macy’s Inc is moving forward with additional store closures in 2026.

item.title: Amazon casse le prix du nouveau robot tondeuse Segway Navimow i220 LiDAR : -580 € sur ce modèle d’une efficacité redoutable
item.description: Le Segway Navimow i220 LiDAR est un robot tondeuse autonome qui mise sur un système de navigation hybride avec IA et télémétrie laser, à retrouver pour 1 619 euros au lieu de 2 199 euros.

item.title: Amazon’s new AI Bio Discovery tool can provide ‘every researcher’ with ‘lab-in-the-loop drug discovery’ – 40+ AI biology models can filter 300,000 novel antibody candidates down to the top results for testing in just weeks
item.description: Amazon's new Bio Discovery tool can design and run experiments for antibody research and drug synthesis.

item.title: Windows 11 tool brings a macOS feature to the desktop — and I can't believe this useful trick isn't in Microsoft's OS already
item.description: A Microsoft exec made a utility to bring this cool macOS feature to Windows 11.

item.title: 12 Best Standing Desks of 2026, Tested and Reviewed
item.description: Take your home office to new heights with our favorite motorized standing desks.

item.title: Honor Robotphone : rencontre en vidéo avec le smartphone du futur muni d’un bras
item.description: Le Honor Robotphone bouscule le marché de la téléphonie avec sa caméra robotisée embarquant une intelligence artificielle multimodale. Découvrez en vidéo ce prototype qui ambitionne de transformer votre téléphone en un véritable assistant de tournage automatisé.

item.title: Scientists Are Using Lightning in a Bottle to Turn Methane Into Methanol
item.description: The findings potentially resolve a long-standing issue with methanol conversion, which has tended to be clunky, inefficient, and environmentally detrimental.

item.title: We Got to See How Unstoppable Supergirl Can Be in Her New Movie
item.description: 'Supergirl' stars Milly Alcock and Jason Momoa introduced new footage right out of CinemaCon.

item.title: The new Tomodachi Life is made to be shared — even if Nintendo doesn’t want you to
item.description: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream is hard to explain. The best way to understand is to see it in action; a screenshot of Handsome Squidward and Bob Belcher falling in love over their shared appreciation of cannibalism makes it clear that, while it's a life sim, the game is really a joke-generating machine. Living the […]

item.title: Fathom adds a bot-less meeting mode in a bid to take on Granola
item.description: Fathom will allow you to choose between video, audio-only, and transcription modes.

item.title: 'The ultimate funny clip generator' — Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream is the perfect Nintendo Switch game for the social media age
item.description: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream stands out thanks to its wacky humor and incredible level of customization.

item.title: The padel app turning matches into meet-cutes
item.description: Playtomic was built to help players book courts and find matches. It’s increasingly becoming a platform for people to meet dating partners and friends. Padel has taken the sports world by storm. In a smaller but growing circle, it’s also become a way to date.

item.title: Boîte de réception | Connexion, facturation et navigation
item.description: Chaque mercredi, notre journaliste répond à vos questions en lien avec le numérique et les nouvelles technologies. Cette semaine, on rappelle l’importance de l’authentification à deux facteurs, on met fin à la facturation automatique et on s’interroge à propos du navigateur Atlas d’OpenAI.
